briefing_zh:
今日 AI 研究的核心主题是**世界模型**与**agentic 能力**的深度融合。多篇论文从不同角度探索「让 agent 理解并预测世界」这一目标：**Qwen-AgentWorld** 直接将语言模型构建为通用 agent 的环境动态预测引擎；**Fast LeWorldModel** 通过并行树状 rollout 大幅提速 JEPA 世界模型的规划效率；**In-Context World Modeling** 则让 VLA 机器人模型通过上下文推断执行环境的隐变量，无需重新训练即可泛化到新视角与新形态。世界模型已经从「辅助组件」演变为 agentic 系统的核心架构。

在 agent 训练方法上，今天出现了两个互补的工作。**OPID** 提出在线技能蒸馏，让 agent 从自身轨迹中自蒸馏密集监督信号，绕过了稀疏奖励的瓶颈。**The Verification Horizon** 则揭示了一个更根本的挑战：随着 agent 生成复杂代码的能力增强，验证解答的难度已经超过生成本身——每个验证器都只是人类意图的代理，而非意图本身。这两个视角合在一起描绘了 agentic RL 当前最真实的困境。

评测与基准方向同样热闹。**GUI vs. CLI** 首次在控制变量下对比了纯屏幕操作与命令行中介两种 Computer Use Agent 范式，揭示了各自独特的执行瓶颈。**NatureBench** 挑战编程 agent 在真实 Nature 级别科学任务上与已发表 SOTA 媲美。**Are We Ready For An Agent-Native Memory System?** 呼吁对 agent 记忆系统进行更系统的评测。三个工作共同指向一个信号：AI agent 能力已经发展到需要更精细、更专门化评测框架的阶段。

开源生态方面，**GLM-5.2** 引发 HN 最高热度讨论（364点），被认为是开源 agent 模型的质变节点。**OpenKnowledge** 以「AI 优先的知识管理」概念斩获 372 点，击败了众多工具类项目。GitHub 新项目中，**Muteki** 多 agent CTF 解题集群和 **Lemma** 人机协作平台均展示了 multi-agent 编排从实验走向实用的趋势。
briefing_en:
Today's AI research is dominated by the deep fusion of **world models** and **agentic capabilities**. Multiple papers tackle the goal of 'giving agents the ability to understand and predict the world' from different angles: **Qwen-AgentWorld** directly builds language models as environment dynamics engines for general agents; **Fast LeWorldModel** dramatically accelerates planning in JEPA-style world models through parallel tree rollouts; **In-Context World Modeling** enables VLA robots to infer latent execution context from short in-context sequences, generalizing to new viewpoints and morphologies without retraining. World models have evolved from auxiliary components to core architecture in agentic systems.

On the training side, two complementary works emerged. **OPID** proposes on-policy skill distillation, letting agents self-distill dense token-level supervision from their own trajectories, bypassing the sparse reward bottleneck. **The Verification Horizon** reveals a more fundamental challenge: as agents become better at generating complex code, verifying those solutions has become harder than generating them — every verifier is only a proxy for human intent. Together, these two perspectives paint the most honest picture of the current agentic RL predicament.

Benchmark and evaluation research is equally vibrant. **GUI vs. CLI** is the first controlled comparison of screen-only versus CLI-mediated Computer Use Agent paradigms, revealing distinct execution bottlenecks in each. **NatureBench** challenges coding agents to match published SOTA on real Nature-level scientific tasks. **Are We Ready For An Agent-Native Memory System?** calls for more systematic evaluation of agent memory. All three point to the same signal: AI agent capabilities have matured to a stage requiring finer, more specialized evaluation frameworks.

In the open-source ecosystem, **GLM-5.2** sparked the hottest HN discussion today (364 pts), hailed as a qualitative leap for open agent models. **OpenKnowledge** topped HN at 372 pts with its 'AI-first knowledge management' concept. On GitHub, **Muteki** (multi-agent CTF swarm) and **Lemma** (human-AI collaboration platform) both signal that multi-agent orchestration is moving from experiment to production.
viral_analysis_zh: **OpenKnowledge** 以 372 点登顶 HN，击败了众多技术工具，原因在于它踩中了「反云端、本地优先」的时代情绪——Obsidian 社区对 AI 原生知识库的需求一直是悬而未决的痛点，开源 + 自托管组合对这个群体有极强吸引力。**GLM-5.2** 的讨论热度（364 点、221 条评论）反映了社区对「开源能否追上闭源 frontier」这一大问题的持续焦虑与期待——每次有明确的开源模型质变，都会触发高密度讨论。**peerd**（浏览器原生 agent 执行框架）同时出现在 HN 和 GitHub 热榜，「零服务器、纯浏览器插件跑 agent 循环」的极简部署概念高度可传播，戳中了开发者对部署复杂度的抵触。
viral_analysis_en: **OpenKnowledge** topped HN at 372 pts by riding the 'anti-cloud, local-first' sentiment — the Obsidian community's demand for an AI-native knowledge base has been an unresolved pain point, and the open-source + self-hosted combination has irresistible pull for this crowd. **GLM-5.2**'s discussion heat (364 pts, 221 comments) reflects the community's ongoing anxiety and anticipation around the question 'can open-source catch up to closed frontier models?' — every clear qualitative leap in open models triggers a high-density discussion. **peerd** (browser-native agent harness) appeared simultaneously on HN and GitHub trending, with the framing of 'run a full agent loop as a browser extension, zero server' being highly shareable — it directly addresses developer frustration with deployment complexity.

huggingface_papers.title: DanceOPD: On-Policy Generative Field Distillation
huggingface_papers.tldr: DanceOPD proposes on-policy distillation to unify text-to-image, local editing, and global editing into a single model. It treats each capability as a generative field and uses on-policy sampling to distill them without conflicting gradients, achieving state-of-the-art across all three tasks with one model.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: DanceOPD 提出在线蒸馏方法，将文本生成图像、局部编辑与全局编辑三种能力统一到单个模型。通过把每种能力建模为生成场并用在线采样进行蒸馏，避免了梯度冲突，在三个任务上均达到 SOTA。
huggingface_papers.authors: Wei Zhou, Xiongwei Zhu, Zelin Xu, Bo Dong

huggingface_papers.title: In-Context World Modeling for Robotic Control
huggingface_papers.tldr: This work proposes In-Context World Modeling to help VLA models generalize to novel camera viewpoints and robot morphologies without re-training. By conditioning on a latent representation of the execution context inferred from a short in-context sequence, the model adapts to unseen setups and substantially improves cross-environment generalization.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 本文提出 In-Context World Modeling，让 VLA 机器人模型无需重新训练就能泛化到新视角和新机器人形态。通过从短上下文序列中推断执行上下文的隐变量表示，模型能自适应未见过的环境配置，显著提升跨场景泛化能力。
huggingface_papers.authors: Siyin Wang, Junhao Shi, Senyu Fei, Zhaoyang Fu

huggingface_papers.title: Qwen-Image-Agent: Bridging the Context Gap in Real-World Image Generation
huggingface_papers.tldr: Qwen-Image-Agent identifies the 'Context Gap' — underspecified or implicit real-world user requests that T2I models cannot handle alone — and proposes a unified agentic framework that actively clarifies intent, retrieves relevant knowledge, and orchestrates T2I generation, achieving more faithful and context-aware image synthesis.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: Qwen-Image-Agent 定义了「上下文差距」问题：真实用户请求往往语义模糊或依赖隐性知识，直接送入 T2I 模型会失效。该框架通过主动澄清意图、检索相关知识并编排生成流程，实现更忠实、更情境感知的图像合成。
huggingface_papers.authors: Zekai Zhang, Jiahao Li, Jie Zhang, Kaiyuan Gao

huggingface_papers.title: OPID: On-Policy Skill Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
huggingface_papers.tldr: OPID addresses the sparse reward problem in agentic RL by introducing on-policy skill distillation: the agent self-distills dense token-level supervision from its own on-policy trajectories without relying on external skill memories or privileged context. This provides fine-grained credit assignment and improves both training stability and final performance on complex agentic tasks.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: OPID 通过在线技能蒸馏解决 agentic RL 中奖励稀疏的问题：agent 从自身在线轨迹中自蒸馏出密集的 token 级监督信号，无需外部技能库或特权上下文。这提供了细粒度的信用分配，在复杂 agentic 任务上改善了训练稳定性和最终性能。
huggingface_papers.authors: Shuo Yang, Jinyang Wu, Zhengxi Lu, Yuhao Shen

huggingface_papers.title: GUI vs. CLI: Execution Bottlenecks in Screen-Only and Skill-Mediated Computer-Use Agents
huggingface_papers.tldr: This paper introduces a controlled benchmark of 440 desktop tasks to isolate the effect of interaction modality (GUI vs. CLI) from other confounds in evaluating computer-use agents. Results reveal distinct execution bottlenecks: screen-only GUI agents fail on precise targeting and state reading, while CLI-mediated agents hit limits in complex multi-step workflows. The benchmark provides actionable signal for improving both paradigms.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 本文构建了含 440 个桌面任务的对照基准，将交互模态（GUI vs CLI）的影响从其他变量中剥离出来。结果揭示了两类瓶颈：纯屏幕 GUI agent 在精确定位和状态读取上失败，而 CLI 中介 agent 在复杂多步工作流上遇到极限，为改进两种范式提供了可操作的分析信号。
huggingface_papers.authors: Xiao Zhou, Siyue Zhang, Yilun Zhao, Jinbiao Wei

alphaxiv_papers.title: Autodata: An agentic data scientist to create high quality synthetic data
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Autodata trains AI agents to act as data scientists that generate high-quality synthetic training and evaluation datasets. The meta-optimization approach, called Agentic Self-Instruct, teaches the agent to produce data that yields stronger downstream models, demonstrated on CS research, legal reasoning, and mathematical tasks.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Autodata 训练 AI agent 充当数据科学家，自动生成高质量合成训练和评测数据集。其元优化方法「Agentic Self-Instruct」让 agent 学会生成能训出更强下游模型的数据，在计算机科学研究、法律推理和数学任务上得到验证。

alphaxiv_papers.title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to Agentic AI: From Foundations to Systems
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: A comprehensive practitioner's reference book covering the full agentic AI stack from LLM substrate and reasoning to memory, tool use, multi-agent orchestration, and production deployment. Organized around the thesis that building great agentic systems requires understanding every layer of the pipeline, not just one.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 一本面向从业者的完整 agentic AI 参考书，从 LLM 底层基础、推理机制到记忆、工具使用、多 agent 编排和生产部署全栈覆盖。核心论点：构建优秀 agentic 系统需要理解整个 pipeline 的每一层，而非只专注某一层。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Qwen-AgentWorld: Language World Models for General Agents
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Qwen-AgentWorld investigates using language models as world models for general agents — predicting environment dynamics, reasoning about state transitions, and enabling planning. The system introduces foundation models for agentic environment simulation and demonstrates that language-based world modeling can substantially improve agent planning and generalization.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Qwen-AgentWorld 探索用语言模型作为通用 agent 的世界模型，预测环境动态、推理状态转换并支持规划。该系统构建了用于 agentic 环境模拟的基础模型，证明基于语言的世界建模能显著提升 agent 的规划能力和泛化能力。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Are We Ready For An Agent-Native Memory System?
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: This paper examines whether current agent memory systems are truly ready for production deployment, arguing that existing benchmarks evaluate memory mainly through end-to-end task success while missing critical dimensions: persistent storage, update mechanisms, consolidation, and lifecycle governance. It proposes a framework for evaluating agent-native memory systems more holistically.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 本文审视当前 agent 记忆系统是否真正准备好实际部署，指出现有基准仅通过端到端任务成功率评测记忆，忽略了持久存储、更新机制、记忆整合和生命周期管理等关键维度，并提出更全面评测 agent 原生记忆系统的框架。

alphaxiv_papers.title: The Red Queen Gödel Machine: Co-Evolving Agents and Their Evaluators
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: The Red Queen Gödel Machine challenges the assumption that self-improving agents can be evaluated against fixed benchmarks. As agents improve, their evaluators must also co-evolve — like the Red Queen running to stay in place. The paper proposes a framework where agents and their evaluation criteria co-evolve, preventing benchmark saturation and enabling open-ended self-improvement.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 红皇后 Gödel 机器挑战了「自我改进 agent 可以用固定基准评测」的假设。随着 agent 进化，评测标准也必须共同进化——如同红皇后必须不断奔跑才能留在原地。本文提出 agent 与评测标准协同进化的框架，防止基准饱和并实现开放式自我改进。

github_repos.name: benchflow-ai/awesome-evals
github_repos.tldr: A curated, community-vetted library of the best resources for building and evaluating AI agents. Covers benchmarks, evaluation frameworks, trace analysis tools, and adversarial testing approaches — a practical one-stop reference for anyone building production AI agent systems.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 社区精选的 AI agent 构建与评测资源库，涵盖基准测试、评测框架、trace 分析工具和对抗测试方法，是构建生产级 AI agent 系统的实用一站式参考。

github_repos.name: NotASithLord/peerd
github_repos.tldr: Peerd is the first AI agent harness built natively in the browser — a Chrome/Firefox extension that runs an agent loop entirely client-side. No server, no cloud dependency: agents can browse, interact with web pages, and execute multi-step tasks directly in the user's browser with full DOM access.
github_repos.tldr_zh: Peerd 是首个原生运行在浏览器中的 AI agent 执行框架——一个 Chrome/Firefox 扩展，完全在客户端运行 agent 循环。无需服务器或云端依赖，agent 可直接在用户浏览器中浏览网页、与页面交互并执行多步任务，拥有完整 DOM 访问权限。

github_repos.name: lemma-work/lemma-platform
github_repos.tldr: Lemma is an open-source workspace where humans and AI agents work as one team, with shared task boards, real-time collaboration, and agent-native APIs. It treats agents as first-class team members alongside humans, bridging the gap between project management tools and autonomous agent systems.
github_repos.tldr_zh: Lemma 是一个开源工作空间，让人类与 AI agent 协作为同一团队：共享任务板、实时协作、面向 agent 设计的 API。它将 agent 视为与人类平等的团队成员，弥合了项目管理工具与自主 agent 系统之间的鸿沟。

github_repos.name: FishCodeTech/muteki
github_repos.tldr: Project Muteki (無敵) is an autonomous multi-model AI agent swarm designed for solving CTF (Capture The Flag) cybersecurity challenges. Multiple specialized agents collaborate — one for reconnaissance, one for exploitation, one for flag extraction — demonstrating practical multi-agent coordination on adversarial tasks.
github_repos.tldr_zh: Project Muteki (無敵) 是一个专为解决 CTF（夺旗赛）网络安全挑战设计的自主多模型 AI agent 集群。多个专门化 agent 协作分工——侦察、漏洞利用、提取 flag——展示了多 agent 编排在对抗性任务上的实际应用。

github_repos.name: per-simmons/unreal-agent-harness
github_repos.tldr: A harness enabling AI agents to procedurally build cities inside Unreal Engine 5.8 via the Unreal MCP integration. Agents receive high-level directives and translate them into Unreal Editor API calls — placing assets, scripting behaviors, and iterating on city layouts — demonstrating agents as creative collaborators in 3D world-building.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 该框架让 AI agent 通过 Unreal MCP 集成在 Unreal Engine 5.8 中程序化构建城市。Agent 接收高层指令并转化为 Unreal Editor API 调用——放置资产、编写行为脚本、迭代城市布局——展示 agent 作为 3D 世界构建创意协作者的潜力。

hackernews.title: Show HN: OpenKnowledge - open source AI-first alternative to Obsidian/Notion
hackernews.tldr: OpenKnowledge is an open-source, AI-first knowledge management system designed as an alternative to Obsidian and Notion. It embeds AI at every layer — intelligent linking, auto-organization, semantic search, and agent-powered Q&A over your notes — while keeping all data local and self-hostable.
hackernews.tldr_zh: OpenKnowledge 是一个开源、AI 优先的知识管理系统，定位为 Obsidian 和 Notion 的替代品。AI 深度嵌入每个层次——智能链接、自动组织、语义搜索以及基于 agent 的笔记问答——同时保持数据本地化和自托管。

hackernews.title: GLM-5.2 is a step change for open agents
hackernews.tldr: An analysis of GLM-5.2, arguing it represents a qualitative leap for open-source agent-capable models. The piece examines why GLM-5.2 outperforms its predecessors on multi-step agentic tasks and what architectural and training choices drove the improvement, positioning it as a credible open alternative to frontier closed models for agent workloads.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 一篇分析 GLM-5.2 的文章，认为它代表了开源 agent 能力模型的质变。文章剖析了 GLM-5.2 在多步 agentic 任务上超越前代的原因，以及推动这一进步的架构与训练选择，将其定位为 agent 工作负载中可信的开源前沿闭源替代方案。

hackernews.title: Show HN: Smart model routing directly in Claude, Codex and Cursor
hackernews.tldr: Workweave Router is an open-source proxy layer that routes LLM requests intelligently based on cost, latency, and capability requirements — directly integrated into Claude, Codex, and Cursor via a single config. It profiles each request at runtime and selects the optimal model, enabling significant cost reduction without sacrificing quality on complex tasks.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Workweave Router 是一个开源代理层，根据成本、延迟和能力需求智能路由 LLM 请求，通过单配置直接集成到 Claude、Codex 和 Cursor 中。它在运行时对每个请求做 profiling 并选择最优模型，在复杂任务上不降质量的前提下大幅削减成本。

hackernews.title: Show HN: Adrafinil - keep a lid-closed Mac awake only while agents work
hackernews.tldr: Adrafinil is a macOS utility that keeps a lid-closed MacBook awake precisely while AI agent processes are running, then lets it sleep when they stop. It monitors agent process signals to intelligently gate sleep prevention — solving the common pain point of agents failing overnight because the laptop slept mid-run.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Adrafinil 是一个 macOS 工具，只在 AI agent 进程运行期间阻止合上盖子的 MacBook 进入睡眠，agent 停止后自动允许休眠。通过监控 agent 进程信号智能控制阻睡开关，解决了 agent 因笔记本夜间睡眠而中断运行的常见痛点。

hackernews.title: Haystack: Open-Source AI Framework for Production Ready Agents, RAG
hackernews.tldr: Haystack is a battle-tested open-source framework from deepset for building production-ready AI agents and RAG pipelines. It features modular components, a pipeline-first design, and integrations with major LLM providers — making it a popular choice for teams that need reliability and flexibility in production agent deployments.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Haystack 是 deepset 开发的久经考验的开源框架，用于构建生产就绪的 AI agent 和 RAG 管道。它提供模块化组件、pipeline 优先设计以及与主流 LLM 提供商的集成，是需要生产级可靠性和灵活性的团队构建 agent 的热门选择。
